checks.description: Check all sub-agents for activity, dispatch idle ones, verify deliverables
checks.prompt:
SUB_HEALTH CHECK — Run sub-agent health assessment.

1. Pull sessions_list for all agent sessions.
2. For each agent: check last activity, context usage, assigned work.
3. If idle >30 min with assigned work: dispatch next task.
4. If context >80%: flag for compaction.
5. Verify any self-reported 'completed' deliverables (spot-check files exist).
6. Report summary to Jarad if anything needs attention.

checks.description: Compact agent sessions approaching context limits
checks.prompt:
QUARTERLY COMPACTION — Scan all agent sessions.

For each session with totalTokens/contextTokens > 70%: trigger compaction. For each session > 90%: force immediate restart with memory flush. Update memory with compaction results.

checks.description: Check all repos for uncommitted changes, unpushed branches, stale PRs
checks.prompt:
GIT STATUS CHECK — Audit all active repositories.

For each repo in ~/code/: check for uncommitted changes, unpushed branches, stale feature branches. Report any repos with dirty state or branches >3 days old. Flag branches that should be merged or deleted.

DREAM CYCLE — Nightly autonomous planning.

1. Review today's completed work across all agents.
2. Identify tomorrow's top 5 priorities (revenue first).
3. Pre-assign tasks to agents based on their domains.
4. Update Plane boards with new priorities.
5. Write summary to memory/dream-cycle-{date}.md.

checks.description: Strategic review of product-market fit and revenue pipeline
checks.prompt:
THINK TANK — Weekly strategic review.

Analyze: (1) Revenue product status (ChoreScore, SVGMe, DigiPop, Wean, Overworld, Cack.io), (2) User metrics if available, (3) Competitor landscape, (4) Resource allocation efficiency. Write strategic memo to memory/think-tank-{date}.md and send summary to Jarad.
